introSection: Dueling Dragons is a steel launched roller coaster located at Guangzhou Sunac Land in Huadu, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This ride is a combination inverted and sit-down roller coaster, like Battlestar Galactica at Universal Studios Singapore. The green side is inverted and the red track is sit-down.

fullText:
Dueling Dragons is a steel launched roller coaster located at Guangzhou Sunac Land in Huadu, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China.

This ride is a combination inverted and sit-down roller coaster, like Battlestar Galactica at Universal Studios Singapore. The green side is inverted and the red track is sit-down.
